name: sillytavern-copy-migration
title: SillyTavern copy full framework migration
description: Migrate every required implementation from sillytavern_copy into the new FableMap native framework, prove parity, and delete sillytavern_copy as the final goal.
scope: full SillyTavern copy migration to native framework and deletion readiness
creator: lijin
notes: High-priority child of 04-22-refactor-project. Goal: audit all implementations in sillytavern_copy, reimplement required SillyTavern-compatible capabilities in the FableMap native framework, record non-migrated reasons, and delete sillytavern_copy after parity and validation. Initial observed baseline: 964 git-tracked files; about 1210 files excluding node_modules/.git. Inventory baseline generated on 2026-04-23: inventory.md now summarizes source areas, capability counts, classification counts, and next migration order; per-file-inventory.md contains a 964-file checklist generated from git ls-files sillytavern_copy. Backend character-card implementation slices on 2026-04-23: parsing now accepts standard SillyTavern V2/V3 data envelopes, preserves world-info secondary/order compatibility, writes PNG metadata before IEND, reads ccv3 PNG metadata before chara, and accepts base64 CharX zip/SFX archives through card.json. Tokenizer slice added SillyTavern-compatible aliases and multi-part message text counting. World/lorebook slice added SillyTavern entry aliases and entries-object test support. Deletion checkpoint committed as 8fdd837 on 2026-04-23: sillytavern_copy tracked files removed, runtime reference scan returned no matches outside task/change docs, focused backend tests passed, full pytest passed, frontend build/test passed. acceptance.md records remaining parent-refactor work separately from copy deletion. Task moved to review pending human acceptance and session recording.

changes: support world-info secondary_keys and order aliases
keep SQLAlchemy model imports compatible with installed backend dev dependencies
write character-card PNG metadata before IEND
prefer ccv3 metadata over chara when both PNG chunks exist
read card.json from CharX ZIP and SFX-style archives
allow /api/v1/characters/parse to accept base64 CharX payloads
reuse existing SillyTavern JSON parser for CharX card data
list SillyTavern-compatible tokenizer aliases in native v1 utilities
normalize model-style tokenizer requests such as claude-3-opus
count all text parts in multi-part message content arrays
allow world_info test payloads to use entries-object lorebook shape
normalize lorebook aliases in domain policy and v1 contracts

results: sillytavern_copy directory removed from tracked files
runtime reference scan returned no matches outside task/change docs
git diff --check and git diff --cached --check passed
remaining_parent_work: split large TavernApplicationService by bounded context
split tavern contracts by API domain
create frontend/app/features and move product-compatible UI workflows out of frontend/app/product
decide provider-specific LLM matrix expansion separately
